name: @vetformat/ovf
description: FHIR-inspired JSON Schema standard for veterinary medical record exchange

scripts.validate: npm run validate:schemas && npm run validate:examples
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run validate && npm run test
scripts.docs:dev: npm run docs:generate && cd docs-site && npm run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:generate && cd docs-site && npm run build
scripts.generate: npm run generate:typescript && npm run generate:python
scripts.version: npm version $npm_package_version --no-git-tag-version --workspace=packages/typescript && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='packages/python/pyproject.toml';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');fs.writeFileSync(f,c.replace(/^version = \".*\"/m,'version = \"'+process.env.npm_package_version+'\"'));" && git add packages/typescript/package.json packages/python/pyproject.toml
